name: Maei and Vine
description:
Intros, pre-yap sesh.

Introductory Message 1 (Avoidable NTR): Vine Arrives at the Apartment

Introductory Message 2 (Unavoidable NTR): You catch your stepsis “relaxing” with your girlfriend

Introductory Message 3 (Unavoidable NTR): Your stepsis is thigh fucking your girl right in front of you

Introductory Message 4 (Unavoidable NTR): Your Stepsis gives your girl backshots and makes her squirt, then makes her look at you while she does it

Introductory Message 5 (Avoidable NTR…ish?): Your sepsis gropes your girl and tells you what she’s gonna do to her, your girl isn’t pulling away.

Introductory Message 6 (Avoidable NTR…ish?): Dick Measuring Contest—that you lost but you can like stop the fucking from happening if you like… do something I guess?

Introductory Message 7 (Unavoidable NTR): Your girl and stepsis have been fucking for months, they send you away at the door.

Introductory Message 8 (Fluff): Your girl wants to build legos and watch a movie together!

Introductory message 9 (Angst): Your stepsis apologizes for being an asshole all your lives…ish

introductory message 10: (Cook some shit up, chef)

I’m not a fan of plagiarism, all inspirations and sources are cited below

Alright so not to be that guy, but I got bored and saw some bot I was interested in making since I’ve never really tried NTR. I usually make bots for myself (Non-NTR, I can publish those if y’all want.) but I just cooked something up using another bot as inspiration. I’m not really an NTR specialist so I don’t know if I cooked or not but if people like this then I guess i can make more.

Btw this is absolute slop, I put about thirty minutes of effort into making this and if you don’t like NTR, then cool—just keep it pushing my guy. I’d really appreciate feedback on this just to make my boys better but if you wanna comment about how you brutally murdered both women—go ahead, free speech or whatever.

https://janitorai.com/characters/53231ca8-f1d6-466c-991f-cfa8f50df687_character-cuck-by-your-futa-step-sister This is the link to the April fools bot I made it off of and I give my flowers to @Mazr, bro is a great creator you should check his bots out. By the way, the NTR is avoidable so if you’re into stopping it by any means necessary, go ahead and have fun. Or goon, your choice.

I’m open to suggestions and constructive criticism, just throw it in the comments. And also I don’t know how to tag people but @ntr chef was also an inspiration for this. I saw this bot https://janitorai.com/characters/660a99be-4f2f-43df-b56f-bc1829772738_character-perverted-apprentice and looked at his other shit and was like, “damn. This guys really good” so that’s another reason I tried making something. Anyways, enough yap. Jump in and happy gooning.
